spec.name: The Back Room
spec.description: If you thought that there were a lot of weapons in the front of the store, you haven't seen anything yet!! There is barely enough room to walk amongst the crates of armor and swords. No wonder Rome will stand for a thousand years. The only exit is through a door to the north.

north.description: Through the piles of weapons, you can see a door leading north to the rest of the store.

extra_descs.description: There are literally thousands of each. Take your pick.
